description: Style NoteThis french connection piece nails all the season's bag trends perfectly - carry this to add a refined dimension to any simple outfit. A necessary indulgence, which is sure to become a love-forever classic in your collection, this bag hits all the fashion notes just right.Product DetailsOne main compartment with a magnetic buttoned closure, an inner zipped pocket and a zipped separatorOne pocket on the front with press down claspsTwo short handles for carrying at easeBranded zippers and sliders for easy useMaterial and CareShell: 100% polyurethane, Lining: 100% polyesterDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtSizeHeight:36 cmWidth: 40 cmDepth: 15 cm
